inputs.prompt: Topic: The rise of four-day work week trials across multiple industries. Publication type: National general-interest magazine. Avoid: Any angle that is essentially 'employees love it and productivity went up' — that has been covered extensively.

Topic: The growing use of AI-generated synthetic data in clinical drug trials, where artificial patient records are used to supplement real patient data. Publication type: Health/science journalism, long-form. Geographic scope: International.
Topic: Housing. Publication type: News website.

Topic: The rapid growth of padel tennis across Europe — from a niche Spanish sport to one of the fastest-growing sports on the continent, with significant real estate and investment implications. Publication type: European business magazine. Geographic scope: Pan-European.
Topic: Something about young people and mental health. Publication type: Not sure yet.
